name: audio-and-sound
tagline: Reference for Phaser 4's SoundManager: loading, playback, volume, panning, spatial audio, and events.
verdict: Detailed, accurate audio API reference covering WebAudio/HTML5 differences and browser autoplay quirks; no security concerns. Inlines several sizeable reference tables that could be split out, lacks negative-trigger scope guidance, and carries no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere, despite explicit related sibling skills (loading-assets, game-setup-and-config) that could misfire.
454-line file inlines several exhaustive reference tables (SoundConfig, SpatialSoundConfig, Events) instead of splitting bulk material to on-demand references.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes found anywhere in the file.
